message:
fix(mcp): propagate label/dependency/comment side-effect errors (beads_rust-qc76)

Replace five `let _ = storage.{add_label,add_dependency,remove_label,
add_comment}(...)` calls in create_issue and update_issue MCP handlers
with proper `.map_err(beads_to_mcp)?` error propagation. Previously,
a storage failure (validation error, duplicate dependency, DB write
failure) was silently discarded, producing a successful MCP response
with the requested side effect missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
